chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-991 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For orders on M.A. 4659/2021 For hearing of main case 30.09.2025 Mir Murtaza Abro, Advocate for Petitioner Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh ----- Learned Counsel for the Petitioner states that this Petition has wrongly been filed before this Court, as such; he under the instructions withdraws the same further stating that the Petitioner would avail the appropriate remedy before the fora provided. In view of above, the Petition stands disposed of as withdrawn along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
